claim: The proposal is to remove global caps on eligible primary medical activity, not to remove item-level controls.
Capitation currently provides a fixed annual amount per enrolled person and remains the core way general practice is funded.
incorporation: Used to define capped/fixed funding baseline

claim: ACC uses regulations, contracts and purchase orders, with clinical necessity/scope/documentation requirements.
incorporation: Used as analogy for FFS rules-based stream

claim: Uncapped FFS without controls can increase low-value activity/gaming/fiscal exposure.
Uncapped FFS with capitation and place accountability can restore marginal supply while protecting equity.
